mapper.update: update kb_video set is_deleted =1 where id = #{id}
update kb_video set is_deleted =2 where id = #{basicId}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_video t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.id},'%')
AND t.wh_id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.whId},'%')
AND t.title like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.title},'%')
AND t.auth like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.auth},'%')
AND t.dept_id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.deptId},'%')
AND t.pub_time like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.pubTime},'%')
AND t.category_id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.categoryId},'%')
AND t.model_id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.modelId},'%')
AND t.exp_time like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.expTime},'%')
AND t.cover like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.cover},'%')
AND t.video_url like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.videoUrl},'%')
AND t.video_src like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.videoSrc},'%')
AND t.label like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.label},'%')
AND t.model_code like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.modelCode},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM kb_video t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.id},'%')
AND t.wh_id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.whId},'%')
AND t.title like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.title},'%')
AND t.auth like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.auth},'%')
AND t.dept_id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.deptId},'%')
AND t.pub_time like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.pubTime},'%')
AND t.category_id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.categoryId},'%')
AND t.model_id like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.modelId},'%')
AND t.exp_time like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.expTime},'%')
AND t.cover like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.cover},'%')
AND t.video_url like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.videoUrl},'%')
AND t.video_src like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.videoSrc},'%')
AND t.label like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.label},'%')
AND t.model_code like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.modelCode},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbVideoEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_video t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}

select vi.id as id, vi.wh_id as whId, vi.title as title, vi.auth as auth, vi.dept_id as deptId, vi.pub_time as pubTime, vi.category_id as categoryId, vi.model_id as modelId, vi.exp_time as expTime, vi.cover as cover, replace(JSON_EXTRACT(vi.video_src, "$[0].url"), '"', '') videoUrl, vi.label as label, vi.model_code as modelCode, vi.remark as remark, vi.sort as sort, vi.status as status, vi.create_time as createTime, vi.create_user as createUser, vi.is_deleted as isDeleted, user.real_name as authName, ct.name as categoryName, dept.name as deptName, ct.sw_id swId, sw.name as subjectWarehouseName
from kb_video vi join kb_category ct on vi.category_id = ct.id join kb_subject_warehouse sw on sw.id = ct.sw_id join castle_sys_user user on vi.auth = user.id join castle_sys_dept dept on dept.id = vi.dept_id where vi.id =#{id}

select video.*,ct.sw_id as swId ,bu.readCount from kb_video video left join (select count(1) as readCount, b_id from kb_basic_user where type = 1 group by 2) bu on video.id = bu.b_id left join kb_category ct on ct.id =video.category_id
video.is_deleted = 2 and video.status=1
and video.category_id =#{swId}
order by readCount desc ,pub_time desc limit 4

select video.*, user.real_name authName ,ct.sw_id as swId from kb_video video left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = video.auth join kb_category ct on ct.id =video.category_id where video.is_deleted = 2 and video.status=1 order by rand() limit 5
